discover_message: "...What? The seed is glowing!" The genes of Mangonian and Star Kiwi resonate, birthing a fruit unlike anything before — [Tropical Nova] discovered!
The sweetness of melon and the richness of grape entwine
column5: and a softly glowing fruit like a drop of moonlight... [Moondrop] discovered!

discover_message: The watermelon's rind cracks and warps audibly while the lemon's sourness flares like flame — [Dragon Fruit] discovered!
Mango and grape juices blend together and nectar begins to drip on its own... [Cosmo Nectar] discovered!
Melon's sweetness is wrapped in watermelon's hardness
column5: and a fruit like an asteroid forms — [Asteroid Berry] discovered!

discover_message: The Star Kiwi's light and the lemon's sourness clash and the flesh turns translucent... a [Phantom Grape] that seems to vanish at a touch — discovered!
All attributes resonate and the seed begins to shine like the cosmos itself — the legendary fruit [Cosmic King] is born!!
The moment flame and phantom intersect
column5: a fruit grows from the void — [Void Fruit]. A taste from the edge of the universe no one has known.

discover_message: The moment two legends become one
column5: crescent moonlight pours in — [Crescent Yuzu]. The entire history of this orchard dwells in this single fruit.
